skills.title: PCB design (plugin scaffold — under construction)
skills.summary: Author and edit .minpcb printed-circuit-board documents. This plugin is an early scaffold: the editor canvas, the Python worker, and the full tool surface land in later rounds. Today only a liveness handshake (minerva_pcb_ping) is wired.
skills.preconditions: A .minpcb document is open OR the user has asked for PCB work (an anonymous editor can be spawned via minerva_create_plugin_editor with editor_item_id "new_pcb").
skills.outcome: The plugin responds to the liveness handshake. No real PCB geometry is produced yet — tell the user the PCB plugin is under construction and only the ping tool is available this round.
skills.steps:
1. Call minerva_pcb_ping to confirm the backend is alive and report its version.
2. Tell the user the PCB editor is a scaffold: the canvas and design tools arrive in later rounds.
skills.system_prompt: The PCB plugin is under construction. Only minerva_pcb_ping is available — it returns {ok, plugin, version, echo} to confirm the backend is alive. There is NO PCB geometry engine, no worker, and no canvas wired yet. Do not attempt to author board layouts; if the user asks for real PCB work, explain that the plugin is an early scaffold and only the liveness handshake is implemented this round.
